description: Add governance, reliability, and rollout guardrails to the gradual migration from mission-control to agent-observatory.

userStories.title: Create migration scope cutline document
userStories.description: As a migration lead, I want a fixed scope cutline so that parity goals and release boundaries are explicit.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/scope-cutline.md with sections: Parity, Equivalent, New
Add a domain classification table covering Auth, Task, Webhook, Scheduler, Pipeline, GitHub Sync, and Super Admin
Add explicit in-scope and out-of-scope lists for the current release
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define migration SLO and non-functional targets
userStories.description: As an operator, I want measurable SLO targets so that migration success is validated by numbers, not opinions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/slo-targets.md with target metrics for API p95, WebSocket reconnect time, event loss rate, RPO, RTO, and retention
Include a target or measurement source or alert threshold table for each metric
Define monthly error budget and breach response policy
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document data model boundary principles
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want clear storage boundaries so that UAEP telemetry and ops-domain data evolve independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/data-model-principles.md defining the UAEP event store vs ops domain store boundary
Define required common columns for ops tables: workspace_id, created_at, updated_at, actor
Document naming, indexing, and foreign key conventions for new domain tables
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create source-to-target backfill mapping
userStories.description: As a data migration engineer, I want explicit mapping rules so that migration scope and transformations are deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/backfill-plan.md with source-to-target mappings for Tasks, Reviews, Notifications, Activities, and Webhooks
Document required field transformations and null-handling policy per entity
Document unsupported records handling and skip policy
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add idempotency and upsert conflict policy
userStories.description: As a migration engineer, I want idempotent load rules so that reruns are safe and predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add idempotency key format for each mapped entity in docs/migration/backfill-plan.md
Define upsert conflict resolution policy for create, update, and delete semantics
Add deterministic ordering rule for replayed source records
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migration rehearsal validation script
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want a dry-run validator so that backfill correctness can be checked before production execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Add scripts/migration/rehearsal-check.sh
Script verifies dry-run row count parity and checksum diff output for mapped entities
Script exits non-zero when any required parity check fails
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create shadow comparator core module
userStories.description: As a release owner, I want a comparator module so that legacy and new outputs can be diffed consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add packages/server/src/domains/migration/shadow-mode.ts
Define comparator interfaces and shadow diff payload schema
Support diff result statuses: match, mismatch, missing_legacy, missing_new
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose shadow report API endpoint
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a shadow report endpoint so that parity can be measured during phased rollout.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose GET /api/v1/migration/shadow-report in server routes
Response includes pass_count, fail_count, and top_diffs
Return stable error code when shadow mode is disabled
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Gate shadow mode by environment flags
userStories.description: As an operator, I want environment-gated shadow mode so that comparison can be turned on safely by phase.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shadow mode flags in server configuration with default OFF
Ensure shadow report endpoint runs only in read-only comparison mode
Document phase-based enablement for Phase 2 and Phase 3
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create feature flag baseline config
userStories.description: As an operator, I want domain-level feature flags so that migration rollout can be controlled incrementally.
acceptanceCriteria: Add packages/server/src/config/feature-flags.ts
Define flags: auth_v2, tasks_v2, webhooks_v2, kill_switch_all_v2
Provide typed accessor helpers for flag reads
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Apply domain feature guards to v2 routes
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want v2 routes guarded by domain flags so that each domain can be rolled out independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Ensure auth_v2 guards auth v2 routes
Ensure tasks_v2 guards tasks v2 routes
Ensure webhooks_v2 guards webhooks v2 routes
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement global kill switch behavior
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a global kill switch so that all v2 routes can be disabled immediately during incidents.
acceptanceCriteria: If kill_switch_all_v2 is enabled, v2 routes return 503 with a stable error code
Error response includes machine-readable reason field
Add regression tests for enabled and disabled kill switch states
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define phase exit and rollback criteria
userStories.description: As a program manager, I want numeric phase gates so that go or no-go decisions are objective and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/phase-exit-criteria.md with numeric DoD and rollback triggers for Phase 0 through Phase 4
Include required evidence checklist per phase: test run id, metrics snapshot, and incident count
Add go or no-go approval template with sign-off fields
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create domain ownership matrix
userStories.description: As a tech lead, I want clear domain ownership so that migration decisions and escalations are unambiguous.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/migration/ownership-and-adr.md with DRI matrix per migration domain
Include escalation chain and approval roles
Map each migration domain to planned ADR identifiers
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add ADR template and lifecycle rules
userStories.description: As an architecture owner, I want a standard ADR process so that key migration decisions remain traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/adr/0000-template.md
Document ADR naming, status transitions, and required sections
Link ADR process from docs/migration/ownership-and-adr.md
Typecheck passes
